L1_headline: + SEM – Michael E. Tarvin disposed 19,640 shares (tax withholding). | 08/01/25
L2_brief: Michael E. Tarvin, Executive Vice President of Select Medical Holdings, disposed of 19,640 shares at $12.57 per share on August 1, 2025. This was not a voluntary sale but rather a mandatory surrender of shares to cover tax withholding obligations upon vesting of restricted stock, which is a neutral signal regarding insider sentiment.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a routine tax withholding transaction associated with restricted stock vesting, not a discretionary sale. The insider retains a substantial holding of over 508,000 shares, indicating continued alignment with shareholders.
risks_flagged: Transaction is mandatory tax withholding, not discretionary selling - neutral signal
